security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src https://fonts.gstatic.com

bundle.longDescription: Sapu Sapu scans C: and D:, surfaces the biggest space and developer caches, and cleans the safe ones with a preview-first, real-reclaim workflow.
